description: An official letter or statement verifying an individual's recurring pension distribution details, usually issued by an employer or retirement board.

first_name.instruction: First name of the pension recipient.

middle_name.instruction: Middle name of the pension recipient.

last_name.instruction: Last name of the pension recipient.

recipient_ssn.instruction: Social Security Number of the recipient. Reformat as XXX-XX-XXXX.

recipient_state.instruction: State of the recipient. Two-letter code.

payer_name.instruction: Name of the pension plan or administering organization.

payer_ein.instruction: Employer Identification Number of the payer.

payment_start_date.instruction: Date pension payments began. YYYY-MM-DD format.

distribution_code.instruction: IRS distribution code (e.g., 7 for normal distribution).

tax_year.instruction: Tax year the pension income is reported for.

document_date.instruction: Date the statement was issued. YYYY-MM-DD format.
